title: selaginella longirostris
intro: Selaginella longirostris, also known as the spiny spike moss, is a type of fern-like plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella longirostris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
